import {react, useState} from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; function EditTheme (){ const[themeName,setTheme_Name]=useState(''); const[themePrice,setTheme_Price]=useState(''); const[themeDesc,setTheme_Desc]=useState(''); const handleClick=(e)=>{ e.preventDefault() const theme={themeName,themePrice,themeDesc} console.log(theme) fetch("http://localhost:8080/admin/addTheme", { method:"PUT", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:JSON.stringify(theme) }).then(()=>{alert("Theme Submitted")}) } return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout
















Edit Theme


setTheme_Name(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Price(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Desc(e.target.value)}>







} export default EditTheme
